phases.name: Layer 0 - Data Foundation
phases.description: Establish ERP integration and maintain canonical commerce foundations.

tasks.title: 0.1 ERP Integration
tasks.description: Sync raw Sankhya ERP data into MetalShopping canonical tables.
tasks.notes: Implementation exists on feat/erp-oracle-integration but is not merged to main and has not completed live Sankhya validation.

tasks.title: 0.2 Catalog
tasks.description: Canonical product identity, taxonomy, identifiers, attributes, and status.
tasks.notes: Master plan marks as IMPLEMENTED.

tasks.title: 0.3 Pricing
tasks.description: Internal price, replacement cost, average cost, history, and pricing rules.
tasks.notes: Master plan marks as IMPLEMENTED.

tasks.title: 0.4 Inventory
tasks.description: Current positions, position history, on-hand quantity, and last movement dates.
tasks.notes: Master plan marks as IMPLEMENTED.

tasks.title: 0.5 Suppliers
tasks.description: Supplier directory, driver manifests, enable/disable, and strategy registration.
tasks.notes: Master plan marks as IMPLEMENTED.

tasks.title: 0.6 Shopping
tasks.description: Market collection, run orchestration, supplier signals, reads, and exports.
tasks.notes: Master plan marks as IMPLEMENTED.

phases.name: Layer 1 - Operational Intelligence
phases.description: Operational dashboards and intelligence over pricing, products, inventory, and shopping operations.

tasks.title: 1.1 Analytics Home
tasks.description: Morning dashboard for business health and daily attention items.
tasks.notes: Master plan marks as ~50% IMPLEMENTED and detailed.

tasks.title: 1.2 Pricing Intelligence
tasks.description: Margin risk, stale prices, repricing guidance, and market alignment.
tasks.notes: Master plan marks as PARTIAL and detailed.

tasks.title: 1.3 Product Intelligence
tasks.description: Product health, dead stock, gaps, and channel focus analysis.
tasks.notes: Master plan marks as PARTIAL and detailed as domain analytics.

tasks.title: 1.4 Inventory Intelligence
tasks.description: Coverage days, overstock, stockout risk, and buying suggestions.
tasks.notes: Master plan marks as PARTIAL.

tasks.title: 1.5 Shopping Ops
tasks.description: Run success, coverage, supplier performance, and data freshness.
tasks.notes: Master plan marks as PARTIAL.

phases.name: Layer 2 - Sales & Client Intelligence
phases.description: CRM, quoting, client health, partner tracking, projects, and seller performance.

tasks.title: 2.1 CRM Core
tasks.description: Customer directory, purchase history, contacts, and seller wallet ownership.
tasks.notes: Master plan marks as PLANNED.

tasks.title: 2.2 Quoting Intelligence
tasks.description: Competitive quote analysis, discount safety, complements, and group analysis.
tasks.notes: New domain from conversation; master plan says high business value.

tasks.title: 2.3 Client Intelligence
tasks.description: Client health, churn risk, reactivation, patterns, and reminders.
tasks.notes: Master plan marks as PLANNED as CRM V2.

tasks.title: 2.4 Partner Intelligence
tasks.description: Architect and designer relationship tracking and activity health.
tasks.notes: New domain from conversation.

tasks.title: 2.5 Construction Projects
tasks.description: Project registry, phase tracking, opportunity matching, and luxury profiling.
tasks.notes: New domain from conversation.

tasks.title: 2.6 Seller Analytics
tasks.description: Seller-level performance, product mix, cross-sell misses, and coaching signals.
tasks.notes: Master plan marks as PLANNED.

phases.name: Layer 3 - Buying & Supply Intelligence
phases.description: Buying recommendations and supplier evaluation intelligence.

tasks.title: 3.1 Procurement Intelligence
tasks.description: Buying recommendations by demand, lead time, coverage, and seasonality.
tasks.notes: Master plan marks as PLANNED.

tasks.title: 3.2 Supplier Intelligence
tasks.description: Supplier evaluation for price competitiveness, reliability, and alternatives.
tasks.notes: Master plan marks as PARTIAL via Shopping and Suppliers.

phases.name: Layer 4 - Digital Commerce Intelligence
phases.description: Marketplace integrations, channel analytics, and lead qualification.

tasks.title: 4.1 Marketplace Integration
tasks.description: Integrate MercadoLivre, Amazon, and e-commerce channel data.
tasks.notes: Master plan marks as NOT PLANNED.

tasks.title: 4.2 Channel Analytics
tasks.description: Revenue, margin, performance, and strategy analysis per channel.
tasks.notes: Master plan marks as NOT PLANNED.

tasks.title: 4.3 Lead Qualification
tasks.description: Behavioral qualification from views, carts, and inquiry patterns.
tasks.notes: Master plan marks as NOT PLANNED.

phases.name: Layer 5 - Marketing Intelligence
phases.description: Campaign selection, competitor intelligence, and customer segmentation.

tasks.title: 5.1 Campaign Intelligence
tasks.description: Choose products to promote using margin, stock, and positioning signals.
tasks.notes: Master plan marks as NOT PLANNED.

tasks.title: 5.2 Competitor Intelligence
tasks.description: Monitor competitor websites, ads, pricing, launches, and campaigns.
tasks.notes: Master plan marks as NOT PLANNED.

tasks.title: 5.3 Customer Segmentation
tasks.description: Segment customers by behavior, value, and product preferences.
tasks.notes: Master plan marks as NOT PLANNED.

phases.name: Layer 6 - AI Agents & Autonomous Operations
phases.description: Natural-language intelligence and governed agents across pricing, procurement, marketing, and sales.

tasks.title: 6.1 AI Copilot
tasks.description: Natural-language interface over operational and strategic data.
tasks.notes: Master plan marks as NOT PLANNED.

tasks.title: 6.2 Pricing Agent
tasks.description: Governed repricing proposal generation from market, cost, and history.
tasks.notes: Master plan marks as NOT PLANNED.

tasks.title: 6.3 Procurement Agent
tasks.description: Governed purchase-order suggestions from demand and lead time.
tasks.notes: Master plan marks as NOT PLANNED.

tasks.title: 6.4 Marketing Agent
tasks.description: Campaign suggestions driven by competitors, products, and segments.
tasks.notes: Master plan marks as NOT PLANNED.

tasks.title: 6.5 Client Agent
tasks.description: Proactive outreach and product suggestions for sellers.
tasks.notes: Master plan marks as NOT PLANNED.

tasks.title: 6.6 Strategic Advisor
tasks.description: Weekly business synthesis with opportunities, threats, and focus areas.
tasks.notes: Master plan marks as NOT PLANNED.

tasks.title: 6.7 Quoting Agent
tasks.description: Real-time quote assistance for competitiveness, complements, and discount safety.
tasks.notes: Master plan marks as NOT PLANNED.

phases.name: Cross-Cutting Infrastructure
phases.description: Shared operational services and productization capabilities that support all layers.

tasks.title: C.1 Alerts & Notifications
tasks.description: Email, SMS, WhatsApp, and in-app alert delivery.
tasks.notes: Master plan notes worker reserved.

tasks.title: C.2 Automation Engine
tasks.description: Governed action execution for triggers, campaigns, and async follow-ups.
tasks.notes: Master plan notes worker reserved.

tasks.title: C.3 Agent Runtime
tasks.description: Shared observe-think-plan-govern-act runtime with decision logging.
tasks.notes: Master plan marks as NOT PLANNED.

tasks.title: C.4 Multi-tenant Productization
tasks.description: Tenant isolation, onboarding, and governance for productized rollout.
tasks.notes: Master plan says architecture exists.
